name: Supabase Guard
description: Supabase CLI protection: project deletion, database resets, branch deletion, secret removal, and destructive migration commands. Derived from the destructive_command_guard pattern library.

rules.name: Require access request for supabase db reset
rules.description: supabase db reset drops and recreates the entire database. All data will be lost. Safer alternative: `supabase db dump -f backup.sql` — Dump the database before resetting.

rules.name: Require access request for supabase db push
rules.description: supabase db push applies migrations to the remote database. Use --dry-run to preview first. Safer alternative: `supabase db push --dry-run` — Preview migration changes without applying them.

rules.name: Require access request for supabase migration repair
rules.description: supabase migration repair modifies the migration history. This can cause drift between schema and migrations. Safer alternative: `supabase migration list` — Review current migration status before repairing.

rules.name: Require access request for supabase migration down
rules.description: supabase migration down reverts applied migrations. Schema changes and associated data may be lost. Safer alternative: `supabase migration list` — Review applied migrations before reverting.

rules.name: Require access request for supabase projects delete
rules.description: supabase projects delete permanently removes the entire Supabase project and all its data. Safer alternative: `supabase db dump -f backup.sql --linked` — Dump the database before deleting the project.

rules.name: Require access request for supabase sso remove
rules.description: supabase sso remove disconnects an SSO identity provider. All users authenticating via that provider will be locked out. Safer alternative: `supabase sso list` — List SSO providers before removing.

rules.name: Require justification for supabase db shell destructive
rules.description: supabase db shell with destructive SQL (DROP/TRUNCATE/DELETE/ALTER). Verify the command carefully. Safer alternative: `supabase db dump -f backup.sql` — Dump the database before running destructive SQL.

rules.name: Require justification for supabase migration squash
rules.description: supabase migration squash consolidates migrations and omits data manipulation statements (INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE). Safer alternative: `supabase migration list` — Review migrations before squashing.

rules.name: Require justification for supabase functions delete
rules.description: supabase functions delete removes a deployed Edge Function. This causes immediate downtime for that function. Safer alternative: `supabase functions list` — List functions to verify the correct one.

rules.name: Require justification for supabase storage rm
rules.description: supabase storage rm deletes objects from storage. With --recursive, entire directories are removed. Safer alternative: `supabase storage ls {path}` — List storage contents before deleting.

rules.name: Require justification for supabase secrets unset
rules.description: supabase secrets unset removes secrets from the project. Edge Functions depending on them will break immediately.

rules.name: Require justification for supabase orgs delete
rules.description: supabase orgs delete permanently removes the organization and may affect all projects within it. Safer alternative: `supabase orgs list` — List organizations to verify the correct one.

rules.name: Require justification for supabase branches delete
rules.description: supabase branches delete permanently removes a preview branch and its database. Safer alternative: `supabase branches list` — List branches to verify the correct one.

rules.name: Require justification for supabase domains delete
rules.description: supabase domains delete removes the custom domain configuration. Clients using the custom domain will lose access.

rules.name: Require justification for supabase vanity subdomains delete
rules.description: supabase vanity-subdomains delete removes the vanity subdomain. Clients using it will lose access.

rules.name: Require justification for supabase network restrictions update
rules.description: supabase network-restrictions update modifies allowed CIDR ranges. Misconfiguration can lock out all database connections.

rules.name: Require justification for supabase config push
rules.description: supabase config push overwrites the remote project configuration with local config.toml settings.

rules.name: Require justification for supabase stop no backup
rules.description: supabase stop --no-backup stops the local stack and permanently deletes all data volumes.
